name: Review Getter — ask for a Google review (+ day-3 nudge)

parameters.content:
## Review Getter
Sends a customer a friendly "leave us a Google review" email, then a gentle reminder 3 days later.

### How it's fed
Use the **Reviews** tab in TB Command (or the client dashboard) — tap **Ask for a review**. It POSTs here with:
name, email, review_link, business

### Setup
1. Attach your Gmail SMTP credential on BOTH Email nodes.
2. Save → flip **Active**.

That's it. Every request you send from TB Command now emails the customer automatically.

⚠️ Only ask real, happy customers — and send everyone the same link (don't hide it from unhappy ones). That keeps you on the right side of Google's rules.

parameters.subject: =Quick favor, {{ $json.body.name }}? 🙏
=One more quick thing, {{ $json.body.name }} 🌟
